Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-29-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sarah Shapero, 415.273.3504 of Shapero Law Firm appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Hernan Macdula.
Katherinr Meleski,949.263.1800 of The Ryan Firm appearing via Zoom for Defendant Speciaized Loan Servicing.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for violation of CC 2923.7. Plaintiff failed to allege any facts and failed to provide any facts that could be alleged in opposition to support any violation of this code section. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Allegations are sufficient to support claims for violation of CC 2923.6, negligence and UCL. P alleged a change in financial circumstances and any argument regarding the sufficiency of the appeal, which is a alleged to have been submitted, is a question of fact for a jury to determine. As previously stated, the Court will follow Alvarez on the issue of duty. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action. Note that as to the cause of action for negligence this Court will follow Alvarez v. BAC Home Loans Servicing, L.P. (2014) 228 Cal.App.4th 941 and to the extent the demurrer is based on the lack of duty argument, it is overruled. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
